qa_pairs.question: How can a user access help for a particular command within the OpenStack command-line interface?
qa_pairs.answer: To get help on a particular command (e.g., options and arguments of the command), one can type `help <command group> <command>`.

qa_pairs.question: Are all commands in the OpenStack command-line interface accessible to every user, or are there restrictions?
qa_pairs.answer: Many commands are available only to OpenStack administrators and will return an error message if a non-administrator tries using them.
